page.title: Introduction
page.p: This Appendix contains variations and additions to the Building Code of Australia (BCA) provisions which are considered necessary for the effective application of the Code in Queensland and shall be treated as amendments to the Code.
In Queensland all the NCC 2022 provisions remain in force until 30 April 2027.
In Queensland, the NCC 2025 edition is adopted and has legal effect on 1 May 2027.
Any amendments to NCC 2025 will also be adopted and have lawful effect after 1 May 2027.
Section 37 of the Building Act 1975 continues to apply to the edition of the BCA in force in Queensland.
The Queensland Development Code continues to apply to the NCC edition in force in Queensland.
